meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome no project ideas. An intermediate case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS deployment.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no project ideas' paralysis by building micro-SaaS tools that target high-intent, low-competition keywords. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for automated implementation, you can ship functional, revenue-generating passive income assets in under 48 hours, turning technical skills into a scalable, automated business model.
content.intro:
The cold sweat of the empty repository is the silent killer of every freelancer's career. You have the technical stack, the architectural patterns, and the desire to build, yet the 'perfect idea' remains a mirage. You’re trapped in a cycle of billable hours, trading time for money while your creative potential sits dormant on the shelf.

But what if you stopped waiting for a lightning strike and started building a system? Passive income isn't about finding a golden goose; it’s about deploying micro-utilities that solve specific, boring, and profitable problems. With modern AI orchestration, the gap between 'no idea' and 'live product' has collapsed, allowing you to transition from a developer for hire to a founder of your own automated revenue stream.

steps.title: Identify High-Intent Micro-Niches
steps.description: Use AI to scrape Reddit and search volume data to find recurring user pain points that lack a dedicated tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in 'boring' SaaS, specifically looking for repetitive tasks in accounting, legal, or content creation that lack a modern API-first solution. Output 5 niche ideas with high potential for subscription-based passive income.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Search top trending pain points on IndieHackers and Twitter for micro-SaaS ideas under $5k MRR.'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Schema
steps.description: Define a lean database schema that supports multi-tenancy and subscription management from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for users, subscription_plans, and a feature-specific data store. Ensure row-level security policies are included.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --write 'Generate Prisma schema for multi-tenant micro-SaaS with Stripe integration.'

steps.title: Automate the Core Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the business logic layer, focusing on the primary value proposition of your tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core backend logic for a service that processes [Niche Task] using OpenAI's API, ensuring robust error handling and rate-limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --edit 'Implement the core API processing logic using the defined schema and standard error handling.'

steps.title: Deploy the Frontend Interface
steps.description: Quickly scaffold a professional-grade UI using a component library to reduce time-to-market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard UI using Next.js and Tailwind CSS that displays subscription status and the primary application output.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --generate 'Create dashboard view with Shadcn UI components for user input and results display.'

steps.title: Implement Passive Monetization
steps.description: Integrate Stripe billing to ensure the product can generate revenue without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the Stripe Webhook handler for handling successful subscription payments and updating the user's access level in the Supabase database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code --write 'Add Stripe webhook endpoint handler to ensure automated subscription management.'

pro_tips: Always build for 'boring' industries; they have the most money and the least amount of competition from tech-savvy founders.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously; it prevents regressions when you inevitably scale your features.
Prioritize 'Email-first' onboarding; if you can't capture a lead, you don't have a business, you have a science project.
Leverage existing API ecosystems rather than building proprietary data sources; it slashes development time by 70%.
Set up automated logging and error notifications via Slack; passive income requires knowing when things break before your customers do.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, focus on SEO-driven landing pages and cold outreach to targeted communities to validate your first 10 paying users.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your skills sit idle while clients dictate your worth. By building your own micro-SaaS, you reclaim your autonomy and build long-term equity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
